notes.disabled_tools: Removes these tools from the Claude SDK allowedTools list — the model never sees them.
notes.block_local_web_fetch: Pre-tool-use hook blocks WebFetch calls whose URL hostname resolves to localhost, 127.x.x.x, ::1, host.docker.internal, 0.0.0.0, 10.x.x.x, 172.16-31.x.x, 192.168.x.x, or 169.254.x.x.
notes.cli_scope: 'group' means the agent can only query/modify its own agent group via ncl, cannot escalate to global, cannot change its own cli_scope.
